opinion.h4: ONE, INCORPORATED, v. OLESEN, POSTMASTER OF LOS ANGELES. ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF CERTIORARI TO THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE NINTH CIRCUIT. No. 290. Decided January 13, 1958.
opinion.p: Solicitor General Rankin, Acting Assistant Attorney General Leonard and Samuel D. Slade for respondent.
The petition for writ of certiorari is granted and the judgment of the United States Court of Appeals for the Ninth Circuit is reversed. Roth v. United States, 354 U.S. 476.
